name: Deploy + Service Registration + Documentation

v_action_items.summary: Create assistant in VAPI dashboard, set webhook URL to https://career-coaching-hotline-va.zocomputer.io
Generate secret with openssl rand -hex 32, set in both VAPI Bearer Token credential and Zo secrets as CAREER_HOTLINE_SECRET
Buy/import phone number in VAPI and assign to the V (Career Coach) assistant
Create 8-field form in Fillout.com, set webhook to https://career-coaching-hotline-va.zocomputer.io/intake

v_action_items.action: Add voice ID to service env vars
v_action_items.summary: The CAREER_HOTLINE_VOICE_ID is in Zo secrets but needs to be added to the service env_vars for the running process to pick it up
Test call from VAPI dashboard, then test from provisioned phone number. Verify SMS notification, call logging, and intake form matching.

notes: Service registered and confirmed healthy via service_doctor
CAREER_HOTLINE_VOICE_ID exists in system env but user services need it explicitly in env_vars — documented as V action item
CAREER_HOTLINE_SECRET not yet created — V must generate and set in both VAPI + Zo
Intake webhook (port 8421) not separately registered as a service — it can be started manually or V can decide to register it later
Database path inconsistency noted: hotline-webhook.ts uses career-hotline-calls, intake-webhook.ts uses career-coaching-calls — both DBs exist
All 51 integration tests passing as of build
